comment: Hardware ABI probe. Reads ctx[Slot], selects one 4-bit nibble, and encodes its bits as a repeating stereo input-panning pattern. No dereference of the selected ctx word.

params.name: Slot
params.comment: ctx[] index to inspect. The selected word is read but not dereferenced.

params.name: Nib
params.comment: Nibble index inside the selected 32-bit ctx word. Nib 0 is bits 0-3; Nib 7 is bits 28-31.
